entries.objective: To convert equations, Python code and references into LaTeX
entries.prompt: I asked the AI to convert the IPET equations, Python code, tables and IEEE references into LaTeX
entries.ai_output_summary: It provided LaTeX conversion for equations, code listings, tables and references.

actions: I compiled the LaTeX in Overleaf and it was working fine

entries.reflection: Help of AI reduced formatting work and helped me place the technical content correctly in the IEEE template. It saved me a lot of time and effort.
